claude.market_summary: Oil-linked stocks surge on Hormuz disruption while defensive tech and pharma face pressure amid Iran war uncertainty.

gemini.market_summary: Energy stocks are poised for significant gains due to the Strait of Hormuz closure and rising oil prices, while tech and consumer discretionary may face headwinds.

winners.reason: Strait of Hormuz, rising oil prices.

losers.reason: High volume, weak momentum, negative trend.
